title: Stanley Martin Homes Opens New Community in Sherrills Ford

title: Trump Misstates Facts in State of the Union Regarding Charlotte Murder
summary: Trump incorrectly stated the citizenship of a suspect in a Charlotte murder case, claiming the suspect came through open borders.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the politicization of local crime and potential misinformation at the national level.
